name: lolzteam
description: TypeScript/JavaScript SDK for LOLZ Forum and ZT.Market APIs

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && tsc -p tsconfig.esm.json && tsc -p tsconfig.types.json
scripts.codegen:forum: npx ts-node codegen/generate.ts --schema codegen/schemas/forum.json --output src/forum/_generated.ts --class ForumAPI
scripts.codegen:market: npx ts-node codegen/generate.ts --schema codegen/schemas/market.json --output src/market/_generated.ts --class MarketAPI
scripts.codegen: npm run codegen:forum && npm run codegen:market

author: lolzteam-sdk contributors
